categories.description: Begin your meal with these appetizing choices.

categories.name: Desserts
categories.description: Sweet treats to finish your dining experience.

categories.name: Beverages

menuItems.name: Chicken Biryani
menuItems.description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with tender, spiced chicken and slow-cooked to perfection.

menuItems.name: Samosa
menuItems.description: Crispy golden pastry filled with a perfectly spiced potato mixture and herbs.

menuItems.name: Sada Dosa
menuItems.description: Thin, crispy dosa made from fermented rice and lentil batter. Served with chutneys and sambar.

menuItems.name: Onion Dosa
menuItems.description: A popular South Indian crepe stuffed with finely chopped onions, served with savory chutneys.

menuItems.name: Paneer Tikka
menuItems.description: Marinated paneer chunks grilled to perfection in a tandoor with aromatic spices.

menuItems.name: Gulab Jamun
menuItems.description: Sweet, fried dough balls soaked in a fragrant rose-water sugar syrup.

menuItems.name: Mango Lassi
menuItems.description: A creamy, yogurt-based drink perfectly blended with ripe, sweet mangoes.
